name: docker-desktop-cn-patcher

compatibleVersionRules.notes: Generic runtime-first injection: finds index.html entry and bundle assets with fallback heuristics. Newer Docker releases may need new dictionary entries only, while patch flow remains reusable.

features: Native macOS GUI with progress and logs
Administrator permission prompt with system usage description
Ad-hoc signed app bundle for stable macOS permission identity
Bundled Python ASAR extractor/packer, no Node.js or npx required for users
No-restart install mode for GUI installs
Automatic rollback on patch or startup failure where startup checks are enabled
Manual restore original Docker from GUI or CLI
